page: Microsoft Azure EC8ads_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECADCCV5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7763 processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It includes 307 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, though it does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU hardware.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core tests placing in the top 25% at 2718.79. Multi-core performance, software compilation, and database operations fall within the average range, as demonstrated by a Geekbench multi-core score of 6343.0 and a Passmark database operations score of 3689.26. Memory bandwidth for read-only operations is average, reaching 524.81 GB/sec for small cached blocks, but large-block memory write bandwidth is a relative bottleneck, registering in the bottom 25% at 22.52 GB/sec.

This server configuration is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that do not require GPU acceleration. While it handles small-model LLM inference adequately, prompt processing for medium 7B models is weak, scoring 17.32 tokens/sec. The combination of dedicated AMD EPYC processing, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 307 GB of local storage makes this instance type suitable for relational databases, memory-cached web serving, and general-purpose data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure EC8ads_cc_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an 8-vCPU AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz. It features 64.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB per core, alongside 307 GB of local storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers strong single-core CPU performance, though its large-block memory write bandwidth and medium-model LLM prompt processing are weaker. The server is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and caching layers.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC8ads_cc_v5 is an 8-vCPU memory-optimized virtual machine featuring an AMD EPYC 7763 processor, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 307 GB of local storage for database and memory-intensive workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, high memory density, and local storage for memory-intensive workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio
307 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks
Best suited for database operations, caching layers, and memory-intensive workloads
